sourcesContent:
<template src="./template.html"></template>
<style src="./style.css"></style>
<script>
    export default {
        name: 'OSIPicta',

        props: ['src'],
  
        data() {
            return {
                scale: 1,
                x: 0,
                y: 0,
                dragging: false,
                lastX: 0,
                lastY: 0
            }
        },
  
        methods: {
            onWheel(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                
                const delta = e.deltaY > 0 ? 0.9 : 1.1;
                
                this.scale *= delta;
                this.scale = Math.min(5, Math.max(0.1, this.scale));
            },
    
            startDrag(e) {
                this.dragging = true;
                this.lastX = e.clientX - this.x;
                this.lastY = e.clientY - this.y;
            },
    
            onDrag(e) {
                if (!this.dragging) return;
                
                this.x = e.clientX - this.lastX;
                this.y = e.clientY - this.lastY;
            },
    
            stopDrag() { this.dragging = false; },
    
            fitToWindow() {
                const viewport = this.$refs.viewport;
                const img = this.$el.querySelector('img');
      
                // Ждем загрузки изображения
                if (img.complete) {
                    const scaleX = viewport.clientWidth / img.naturalWidth;
                    const scaleY = viewport.clientHeight / img.naturalHeight;
                    this.scale = Math.min(scaleX, scaleY, 1); // не больше 100%
                    this.x = (viewport.clientWidth - img.naturalWidth * this.scale) / 2;
                    this.y = (viewport.clientHeight - img.naturalHeight * this.scale) / 2;
                }
            }
        }
    }
</script>
